Class EfsPublishStatus.Builder<E extends IEfsEvent>

java.lang.Object
org.efs.bus.EfsPublishStatus.Builder<E>
Type Parameters:
E - event class
All Implemented Interfaces:
IEfsEventBuilder<EfsPublishStatus<E>>
Enclosing class:
EfsPublishStatus<E extends IEfsEvent>
public static final class EfsPublishStatus.Builder<E extends IEfsEvent> extends Object implements IEfsEventBuilder<EfsPublishStatus<E>>
Builder class used to create EfsPublishStatus instances. A new Builder instance is acquired by calling EfsPublishStatus.builder().
Author:
Charles W. Rapp

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    EfsPublishStatus.Builder<E>
    activePublishers(int n)
    Sets active publisher count to given value.
    EfsPublishStatus.Builder<E>
    advertisedPublishers(int n)
    Sets advertised publisher count to given value.
    EfsPublishStatus<E>
    build()
    Returns a new EfsPublishStatus event based on this builder's settings.
    EfsPublishStatus.Builder<E>
    topicKey(EfsTopicKey<E> topicKey)
    Sets topic key to given value.

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Method Details

    • build

      public EfsPublishStatus<E> build()
      Returns a new EfsPublishStatus event based on this builder's settings.
      Specified by:
      build in interface IEfsEventBuilder<E extends IEfsEvent>
      Returns:
      new EfsPublishStatus event.
      Throws:
      net.sf.eBus.util.ValidationException - if this builder's settings are incorrectly set.

    • topicKey

      public EfsPublishStatus.Builder<E> topicKey(@Nonnull EfsTopicKey<E> topicKey)
      Sets topic key to given value.
      Parameters:
      topicKey - publish status event is for this topic key.
      Returns:
      this Builder instance.
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if topicKey is null.

    • advertisedPublishers

      public EfsPublishStatus.Builder<E> advertisedPublishers(int n)
      Sets advertised publisher count to given value. This value must be ≥ zero. There is no maximum value limit.
      Parameters:
      n - advertised publisher count.
      Returns:
      this Builder instance.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if n < zero.

    • activePublishers

      public EfsPublishStatus.Builder<E> activePublishers(int n)
      Sets active publisher count to given value. This value must be ≥ zero and ≤ advertised publisher count.
      Parameters:
      n - advertised publisher count.
      Returns:
      this Builder instance.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if n < zero.
